scripts.test: rm -rf /tmp/video-affiliate-worker-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --rootDir . --outDir /tmp/video-affiliate-worker-tests src/affiliate-verification-policy.ts test/affiliate-verification-policy.test.ts && node --test /tmp/video-affiliate-worker-tests/test/*.test.js
